offer: For construction project managers managing 5–15 subcontractors, license expirations cause project delays. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking of licenses and expirations.
problem: Subcontractor license expirations lead to project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among project managers
try_it: Let users try manual entry of license details and dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
